steps.title: Analyze the equation
steps.content: Subtract $2$, then divide by $8$ in $8x+2=10$: $$x=1.$$ The coefficient on $x$ is nonzero.

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: There is exactly one solution. That matches Choice A — Exactly one.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches Choice A — Exactly one, Exactly one, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore A.
